examples: The Earth-Moon system has always been perplexing.
Equally perplexing constituents of Allende are the refractory inclusions: irregular white masses that tend to be larger than chondrules.
It took years to understand many perplexing diseases.
Needless to say, this is deeply perplexing, even with likely European handset market erosion.
The concept of re-marrying an ex-spouse is a perplexing blend of hope and stupidity.
